basics.name: Douglas Maitelli
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer
basics.summary: Accomplished Senior Software Engineer with 16+ years of experience designing and delivering scalable enterprise solutions across financial services, cloud infrastructure, and mobile platforms. Proven expertise in architecting integration frameworks and driving technical innovation from concept to production. Passionate about building maintainable, high-performance systems that solve complex business challenges.

work.name: SAP Concur
work.summary: Developed financial integration services powering Concur Expense processing and enterprise financial systems serving thousands of customers globally.
highlights: Contributed to a team that revamped the Expense management admin interface, improving usability and streamlining administrative workflows
Contributed to a team that delivered AI-powered features from proof-of-concept to general availability, pioneering new capabilities within the product
Architected and implemented a comprehensive integration framework for third-party financial system connectivity, cutting integration time in half
Delivered mission-critical integrations with major financial platforms including Xero, QuickBooks, and Sage Intacct, processing high volumes of transactions

work.name: SAP SE
work.summary: Led enterprise software solutions delivery across European markets, bridging customer requirements with technical implementation while providing technical guidance to distributed development teams.
highlights: Conducted technical discovery workshops at customer sites across Europe, translating complex business requirements into scalable solution architectures
Coordinated distributed development teams across different time zones to deliver enterprise solutions on schedule and within budget

work.name: Flimbo
work.summary: Co-founder and technical lead for innovative vector graphics editing platform with social media integration capabilities. Built end-to-end infrastructure and development pipelines from ground up.
highlights: Architected and developed full-stack web application with real-time collaborative vector editing capabilities
Designed and deployed cloud infrastructure on AWS, implementing CI/CD pipelines that sped up deployment times
Secured first prize at UFRGS Entrepreneurship Marathon, attracting seed funding and strategic partnerships
Grew user base to thousands of active users within 12 months through product innovation and market validation

work.name: SAP Labs Latin America
work.summary: Developed custom solutions for SAP enterprise customers while driving innovation in user experience and development.
highlights: Conducted technical discovery workshops at customer sites across Brazil, translating complex business requirements into scalable solution architectures
Designed and delivered multiple custom enterprise solutions for SAP customers
Served as certified Design Thinking Coach, facilitating workshops for about dozen teams to drive innovation and user-centric product development
Co-created SAP SmartOffice project, an environmental feedback platform for employee input on office climate and lighting systems
Led development of SAP Arrival Guide mobile application while mentoring junior developers and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver a high-quality product
Achieved expert certification in SAP HANA and SAPUI5

work.name: Versul Tecnologia de Acesso Inteligente
work.summary: Led web development operations and implementation for intelligent access control systems serving municipal transportation agencies across Brazil.
highlights: Managed and mentored team of 5 engineers in developing next-generation public transportation management software deployed across multiple Brazilian cities
Architected GPS tracking and route optimization system processing 1M+ location updates daily
Implemented real-time monitoring dashboard enabling municipalities to optimize transit operations

projects.name: App Feevale
projects.description: Developed native mobile application for Universidade Feevale, enabling students, faculty, and staff to access campus services, course materials, and real-time notifications on mobile devices.
highlights: Successfully pitched, developed, and sold application to university
Achieved 15,000+ active users within first year
Supported the application for 3+ years after launch; it continues to serve the university community today, 15+ years after its 2011 release
Implemented offline-first architecture ensuring reliable access to critical campus services when connectivity is limited

projects.name: Flimbo Platform
projects.description: Launched comprehensive vector graphics design platform with social media integration, enabling users to create and share marketing content with enhanced engagement capabilities.
highlights: Won First Prize at UFRGS Entrepreneurship Marathon, validating product-market fit and business model
Built community of 5,000+ active users within first months of launch
Featured in Brazilian tech media and startup showcases as an innovative design and marketing tool

projects.name: SAP SmartOffice
projects.description: Co-created an environmental feedback platform where employees could provide input on office climate and lighting systems to help balance temperatures and lighting in rooms and office areas.
highlights: Awarded First Prize at SAP InnoWeek, recognized for technical excellence and business impact
Deployed across multiple industries
Integrated with SAP HANA for real-time data processing and analytics
Established new standard for enterprise mobility within SAP ecosystem

awards.title: First Prize - SAP InnoWeek Competition
awards.summary: Recognized for innovative SAP SmartOffice project demonstrating exceptional technical architecture and business value

awards.title: First Prize - UFRGS Entrepreneurship Marathon
awards.awarder: Universidade Federal do Rio Grande do Sul
awards.summary: Won top honor among 50+ startup pitches for Flimbo platform, demonstrating product-market fit and scalability

awards.title: Second Prize - Logic and Programming Competition
awards.summary: Outstanding performance in competitive programming event featuring complex algorithmic challenges

awards.title: Silver Medal - OBMEP
awards.awarder: Brazilian Math Olympics of Public Schools
awards.summary: Achieved silver medal in national mathematics competition, ranking in top 0.01% with only 1,950 awards out of 18+ million students
